beers.name: Goat Lager
beers.description: Bright, easy-drinking, and refreshing. This light lager delivers delicate malt notes, a subtle touch of Saaz hops, and a clean, crisp finish that keeps you coming back for more.

beers.name: Pia, Sweet As
beers.description: In the native Maori language of New Zealand, "Pia" simply means beer. Pair that with the iconic Kiwi slang "Sweet As" used to describe something that is cool, awesome, or perfect. This Pilsner is generously hopped with New Zealand grown Nelson Sauvin. Giving it the perfect hoppy kick while still being light and refreshing.

beers.name: Amber Acreage
beers.description: Built on a robust caramel malt backbone, this lager delivers smooth, toasted notes of biscuit and burnt sugar. A subtle hop bitterness snaps on the back end, perfectly balancing the sweetness.

beers.name: La Cabra Loca
beers.description: A bright, easy-drinking Mexican lager brewed for sunshine and good company. Crisp malt character, a touch of corn sweetness, and a refreshingly dry finish make this beer endlessly crushable. Best enjoyed ice-cold with a lime wedge.

beers.name: Tundra Buck
beers.description: This deep-ruby stout pours with a creamy head and delivers an intoxicating aroma of the season. We've infused the rich, malty base, featuring notes of roasted coffee and dark chocolate, with a thoughtful blend of winter spices: cinnamon, nutmeg, and a hint of bright ginger.

beers.name: Beast of Burden
beers.description: Beast of Burden is a nod to the hardworking strength required to craft a traditional Belgian Tripel. This "beast" hides its power behind a sophisticated profile of spicy phenolics and fruity esters. Brewed with premium Pilsner malt and clear candy sugar, it is effervescent, complex, and deceptively smooth. It carries the weight of its high gravity with the grace of a champion workhorse.

beers.name: Grove Refresher - PB & J
beers.description: A liquid tribute to the ultimate childhood classic. We've taken a crisp, tart sour base and layered it with creamy roasted peanuts and sweet concord grape puree. It's a whimsical, nostalgic journey that balances savory nuttiness with a bright, puckering finish.

beers.name: Strawberry Lime Sour
beers.description: A fruited sour ale conditioned on Strawberry puree, and Lime juice.

beers.name: Counting Sheep
beers.description: Our flagship Hazy IPA brewed with raw wheat and malted oats giving it a pillowy soft mouthfeel. Heavily hopped with Citra and Mosaic giving this beer a dank, citrusy aroma and flavor.

beers.name: Headbutt
beers.description: Built on a strong base of pale malt and loaded with a heavy dose of American hops. Expect bright grapefruit, pine, and grassy aromatics balanced by a sturdy malt body and a crisp, assertive finish.

beers.name: Rosehill Ram
beers.description: A modern, high-clarity IPA designed for ultimate drinkability. Built on a lean, light-bodied grain bill, this beer stays out of the way to let a classic trifecta of hops shine. We've utilized Cascade, Columbus, and Nugget to deliver a "New School" experience taking those legendary flavors and refining them into a crisp, refreshing profile that trades heavy bitterness for pure hop saturation. It's clean, snappy, and deceptively easy-drinking.

beers.name: Minotaur
beers.description: A bold red IPA with bright citrus and pine hop character layered over rich caramel and toasted malt. Smooth yet assertive, with a clean, lingering bitterness.

beers.name: King David
beers.description: Sweet and light, notes of honeysuckle, apple, and pear. From Old Stone Cider in Lewisville, PA.

beers.name: Old Stone Blend
beers.description: Light, crisp, and tart with a clean finish. From Old Stone Cider in Lewisville, PA.

items.name: Basket of Seasoned Fries or Tots
items.description: Cajun or Old Bay (+1), Truffle (+2).

items.name: Soft Pretzel Sticks
items.description: Warm baked pretzel sticks brushed with butter and salt, served with our house beer-cheese.

items.name: Fried Pickles
items.description: Breaded pickle spears served with ranch dipping sauce.

items.name: Mozzarella Sticks
items.description: Crispy fried mozzarella served with warm marinara.

items.name: Cheesesteak Egg Rolls
items.description: Crispy egg rolls stuffed with shaved steak, onions, and cheese. Served with sweet red chili sauce.

items.name: The Herd Nachos
items.description: House-made tortilla chips topped with beer cheese, pico de gallo, jalapeños, and sour cream. Add Chicken (+3). Add Shrimp (+4).

items.name: Maple Roasted Brussels
items.description: Brussels sprouts tossed with bacon, maple balsamic glaze, and parmesan.

items.name: BBQ Pulled Pork Loaded Fries or Tots
items.description: Fresh-cut fries or tots loaded with shredded cheese, caramelized onions, scallions, and our pulled pork braised in-house with our chef's choice of beer, drizzled with BBQ sauce.

items.name: Classic Wings
items.description: Bone-in wings tossed in your choice of sauce. Add a side of fries (+3) or tots (+4).

items.name: Boneless Wings
items.description: Boneless wings tossed in your choice of sauce. Add a side of fries (+3) or tots (+4).

items.name: Classic Smash
items.description: Single or double (+2) smash patties with melted American cheese, lettuce, tomato, pickles, & our house secret sauce. Served with a side of fresh-cut fries. Sub Tots (+1) or Side Salad (+2).

items.name: BBQ Bacon Smash
items.description: Single or double (+2) smash patties layered with sharp cheddar, crispy bacon, caramelized onion, and a smoky-sweet BBQ sauce. Served with a side of fresh-cut fries. Sub Tots (+1) or Side Salad (+2).

items.name: The Goat Smash
items.description: Single or double (+2) smash patties topped with creamy goat cheese, crispy bacon, peppery arugula, and balsamic glaze on a toasted brioche bun. Served with a side of fresh-cut fries. Sub Tots (+1) or Side Salad (+2).

items.name: Mushroom & Swiss Smash
items.description: Single or double (+2) smash patties stacked with melty Swiss cheese, sweet caramelized onions, sautéed mushrooms, and a rich roasted-garlic aioli. Served with a side of fresh-cut fries. Sub Tots (+1) or Side Salad (+2).

food.description: Served with a side of fresh-cut fries. Sub tots (+1) or Side Salad (+2). All cheesesteaks also available as wraps.

items.name: Classic Cheesesteak
items.description: Thin-sliced steak, grilled onions, and melted American cheese piled high on a toasted roll. Substitute American cheese for Swiss Cheese or our House Beer Cheese (+1).

items.name: Mushroom & Swiss Cheesesteak
items.description: Thin-sliced steak topped with sautéed mushrooms, grilled onions, and melted Swiss on a toasted roll.

items.name: Classic Chicken Cheesesteak
items.description: Thin-sliced chicken, grilled onions, and melted American cheese piled high on a toasted roll. Substitute American cheese for Swiss Cheese or our House Beer Cheese (+1).

items.name: Buffalo Chicken Cheesesteak
items.description: Shaved grilled chicken, tossed in classic buffalo sauce, mixed with crumbled blue cheese on a toasted roll. Substitute our House Beer Cheese (+1).

food.description: Served with house tortilla chips. Sub fries (+3), tots (+4), or side salad (+3).

items.name: Street Tacos
items.description: Two tacos with your choice of cilantro-lime chicken, chipotle-honey shrimp, or veggie with mushrooms, peppers, and onions, topped with onion, cilantro, and radish, and served with a lime wedge.

items.name: Hot Dogs & Fries
items.description: Two 1/4 pound hot dogs served with a side of fries. Sub Tots (+1).

items.name: B.A.L.T. Wrap
items.description: Bacon, avocado, romaine lettuce, tomato, roasted garlic aioli served with house-made tortilla chips.

items.name: Strawberry Chickpea Wrap
items.description: Fresh strawberries, crisp cucumber, chickpeas, shredded carrot, pepitas, dried cranberries, grated parmesan, and spring mix, wrapped in a flour tortilla with lemon vinaigrette.

items.name: Pesto Chicken Wrap
items.description: Pesto, grilled chicken, arugula, fresh mozzarella, tomato, wrapped in a flour tortilla.

items.name: Classic Margherita
items.description: Fresh sliced mozzarella, tomato, shredded basil, finished with a balsamic glaze.

items.name: Garden Harvest
items.description: Warm flatbread topped with creamy goat cheese, roasted yams, pickled red onion, fresh arugula, and a maple-balsamic drizzle.

items.name: BBQ Pulled Pork
items.description: Warm flatbread topped with cheddar jack cheese, tender pulled pork, caramelized onions, scallions, BBQ sauce, and a maple-balsamic drizzle.

items.name: Classic Caesar
items.description: Crisp romaine lettuce, shaved Parmesan, garlic croutons, and creamy Caesar dressing. Add grilled chicken (+3) or grilled shrimp (+4).

items.name: Blue Cheese & Pear
items.description: Crisp romaine topped with smoky bacon, blue cheese crumbles, fresh pear, cucumber, and pickled red onion, finished with lemon vinaigrette and a maple-balsamic drizzle.

items.name: Spring Berry
items.description: A bright, fresh salad of spring mix, mixed berries, goat cheese, red onion, and candied pecans, finished with strawberry vinaigrette.

items.name: Scoop of Ice Cream
items.description: Now featuring ice cream from Hangry Bear Creamery in Kennett Square, PA. Choose from Vanilla, Chocolate, or Strawberry. Single - $4 / Double - $6.

items.name: Soda Float
items.description: A classic treat - a scoop of Hangry Bear vanilla ice cream topped with your choice of root beer, Coke, or Diet Coke.

items.name: Beer Float
items.description: A grown-up twist on a classic - a scoop of Hangry Bear vanilla ice cream topped with your choice of Tundra Buck or Irish Stout for a rich, creamy finish. *Contains alcohol.

items.name: Crush
items.description: A bright, refreshing cocktail made with vodka, fresh-squeezed citrus juice, and lemon-lime soda. Available in Orange or Grapefruit.

items.name: Mimosa
items.description: A bright, bubbly favorite with fresh-squeezed orange juice and Penns Woods Blanc de Blanc sparkling wine for a crisp, refreshing finish.

items.name: Desert Sunset
items.description: A spicy and unique combination of Gold Tequila, fresh lime juice and grapefruit juice, finished with fresh jalapeno.

items.name: Margarita
items.description: Tequila, triple sec, and fresh lime juice, shaken and served over ice. Crisp, tangy, and refreshingly simple.

items.name: Transfusion
items.description: A bright, refreshing blend of vodka, grape juice, a squeeze of fresh lime, cranberry, and a touch of simple syrup, topped with bubbly ginger ale for a crisp, golf-course-classic sipper.

items.name: Porch Swing Fizz
items.description: A light and refreshing bourbon cocktail with citrus, mint, and ginger ale. Crisp, bubbly, and made for easy porch-side sipping.

items.name: Sip of Spring
items.description: A lively blend of vodka, strawberry, basil, and lime juice topped with Sprite for a crisp, lightly sparkling sip of spring.

items.name: Old Fashioned
items.description: A timeless blend of whiskey, bitters, sugar, and citrus—smooth, balanced, and perfectly simple.

items.name: Classic Martini
items.description: Your choice of gin or vodka, served chilled and smooth in a timeless cocktail that can be prepared classic, dirty, or dry to suit your taste.

items.name: Cold Brew Martini
items.description: A rich and velvety blend of vodka, cold brew coffee, and coffee liqueur, shaken chilled for a smooth cocktail with bold coffee flavor.

items.name: Lemon Drop Martini
items.description: A bright and citrusy martini made with vodka and fresh lemon juice, served chilled with a smooth, sweet-tart finish.

items.name: Vodka Soda (4.5%)
items.description: Light, crisp, and refreshing. These ready-to-drink cocktails blend premium vodka with sparkling soda and natural flavors. Available in: Grapefruit Citrus, Pineapple Mango, Cherry Berry, Orange Citrus, Cranberry Lime.

items.name: Iced Tea & Vodka (4.5%)
items.description: Rosenberger's iced tea mixed with high quality vodka from Boardroom Spirits.

items.name: Crimson Crush Lemonade (5%)
items.description: A refreshingly juicy vodka lemonade that is crimson red from a real hibiscus flower infusion.

items.name: Local Wine from Wayvine Winery & Vineyard
items.description: We proudly offer local wine from Wayvine Winery & Vineyard. Ask your bartender or server for availability of other varieties.

items.name: Sauvignon Blanc
items.description: From Wayvine Winery & Vineyard.

items.name: Cabernet Sauvignon
items.description: From Wayvine Winery & Vineyard.

items.name: Rose Carmine
items.description: From Wayvine Winery & Vineyard.

items.name: Athletic Brewing
items.description: Award-winning, craft non-alcoholic beers for those who want the full flavor of a craft brew without the alcohol.

items.name: Soft Drinks
items.description: We serve a variety of Coca-Cola products. Refills $1.50.
